sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86998" key="prodianapau/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδιαναπαύω</orth>, <sense id="n86998.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take an interval of rest beforehand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0664.tlg001:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Fr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">141</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
